title: 9 Herbal Cream Options for Kidney Patients with Dysuria
description: Saponaria officinalis creams contain properties that may help with dysuria, a painful urination condition. These creams have constituents such as saponins, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Saponins help to reduce inflammation and soothe the urinary tract, making it easier to urinate. The antiseptic properties of saponins also help to combat bacterial infections that can cause dysuria.
